title: sarcochilus major
intro: Sarcochilus major, a type of orchid native to Australia, is a terrestrial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. The herbal preparations of Sarcochilus major often involve drying the plant's roots and leaves, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
